_meta.world: NORTHGATE / NGATE — fully fictional routing (SPEC v2 §0.1)
_meta.statement: Every SLIC, destination, bay, and per-lane statistic is synthetic. Structural shape from noised calibration aggregates only.

post_generation_fixes.fix: lane 6213 dest family renamed to NARVWORTH/NARCT/NARVCT
post_generation_fixes.reason: the prior 5-char code collided with a real chart dest token in the LTC truth corpus; a collision would also blind scrub_check's harvest subtraction. Invariant now pinned by synth-hub-generator/tests/test_world_invariants.py.
